docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERTLE, DON AS TO DEFENDANT OZKAN, SEZER ,AN INDIVIDUAL AND GENERAL PARTNER YELLOW BUS SIGHTSEEING TOURS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
